title: Minimum Number of Flips to Convert Binary Matrix to Zero Matrix
hints: Notice the grid is tiny (at most 3x3). This suggests trying every possible sequence of moves.
Since flipping a cell twice is useless, each cell is either flipped once or never. There are only 2^(m*n) combinations to check.
Iterate through all subsets of cells to flip. For each subset, simulate the flips and check if the grid becomes all zeros. Track the minimum steps.
